[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011001 3
1 11000011 4
2 11001010 4
3 00000010 1
4 10100110 4
5 10101110 5
6 00011111 5
7 01100101 4

70 07 00001000 1
